message:
fix(conformance): suppress clippy too_many_arguments lint on differential test helper

The assert_differential_contract helper in conformance tests takes many
parameters by design — it validates a contract across subsystem, clause,
differential function, reference function, inputs, and expected outputs.
Restructuring into a builder or options struct would add complexity
without improving readability for test-only code. Suppressed the lint
at the function site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
